ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
Probability <> 0.1,
NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Closed Won')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Closed Lost')),
OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Cycle__c)) , ISBLANK(TEXT(Cycle_Price__c)) ),
NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')) , $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Wolves', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Partnership', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Rank_Ranger', MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill 'Cycle' and 'Cycle Price Local' fields
